# Firerain

> Workflow automation for small and medium businesses in Australia.

Firerain is run by Reinier van Vuure, a 30-year operations veteran based in the Barossa Valley, South Australia. Firerain finds the manual, repetitive workflows that are costing SMEs time and money, and builds practical automation fixes — no lock-in, no retainers, no hype.

## What Firerain does

- Identifies workflows worth automating through a free discovery call and workflow audit
- Builds practical automation using tools like Microsoft 365, Xero, Claude, and OpenAI
- Delivers working solutions in 2–4 weeks, tested and handed over so your team can run them
- Covers invoice processing, field reporting, approval routing, data entry elimination, and more

## Who this is for

Small and medium businesses in Australia that are drowning in manual work: re-keying data between systems, chasing approvals, stitching reports together by hand every week.

## Contact

- Website: https://firerain.ai
- Email: info@firerain.ai
- Location: Barossa Valley, South Australia, Australia
- Book a free 20-minute call: https://firerain.ai/#contact

## Process

1. Free discovery call (20 min) — no obligation
2. Free workflow audit (3–5 days) — maps the actual workflow, ranked by impact
3. Your decision point — you choose whether to proceed
4. Pilot automation build (2–4 weeks) — fixed scope, fixed price
5. Integration and expansion — hourly, no retainer
